name: reactivity-approach
question: How to achieve real-time updates for platform-features entities?
decision: Use polling with setInterval (5-10 second refresh) initially. Leverage existing mcpService.callTool for data fetching.
rationale: Polling is simple to implement and sufficient for MVP. Can upgrade to MST domain with MobX reactivity or WebSocket push later if needed. MCP SSE already exists for streaming.
